message:
feat(harness): foreign-adoption stdio evidence + replacement guard + conformance wiring

crates/frankenlibc-harness/Cargo.toml:
 - Enables the `conformance-testing` feature on the
   `frankenlibc-abi` dependency. This exposes the internal
   stdio-evidence log helpers (clear + emit-via-tmpfile) that the
   harness tests now exercise end-to-end.

crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/stdio_evidence.rs (+49):
 New test `foreign_adoption_evidence_from_abi_log_parses_end_to_end`:
  - Clears the stdio evidence log, invokes
    `emit_foreign_adoption_via_host_tmpfile` (which triggers
    the foreign-FILE* adoption path on a real host tmpfile),
    then parses the resulting JSONL row through the public
    `StdioEvidenceIterator`.
  - Asserts schema_version, event_kind=ForeignAdoption,
    function=adopt_foreign_file, fp_origin=Foreign.
  - Pins the ABI-to-harness contract so a breaking change in
    the JSONL schema fails here immediately.

crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/replacement_guard_test.rs (+135):
 Expanded cases for the replacement-guard: new upstream symbols
 caught, source-scan exceptions exercised, and end-to-end checks
 against `scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh`.

crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/regex_glob_ops_conformance_test.rs (+61):
 Additional regex/glob fixture cases covering boundary conditions
 (empty pattern, empty target, multibyte characters, class ranges
 with UTF-8 boundaries).

crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/signal_ops_conformance_test.rs (+35):
 New signal-delivery cases (SIGCONT after SIGSTOP, sigsuspend with
 signal already pending, sigqueue with siginfo payloads).

crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/dirent_ops_conformance_test.rs: tiny
touch-up to match the expanded fixture.

crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/stdio_evidence.rs: the rest of the
file is unchanged.
